description_long: This bungalow features a two-story structure with a prominent hip roof covered in tan shingles. The exterior walls are finished in white, complemented by large, rectangular green-tinted windows distributed across all sides. Multiple balconies and overhangs are present, including a spacious front porch supported by columns and a side balcony with a metal railing. The design incorporates both open and enclosed spaces, with stairways and recessed entryways visible. The overall style is modern, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms, making it suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a tan hip roof, white exterior walls, and large green-tinted windows, featuring balconies and a prominent front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main porch, balcony with railing, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended balcony, multiple windows, and a secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view with grouped windows, a small overhang, and a recessed entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying another balcony, grouped windows, and the continuation of the hip roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all sides
